memberdef.argsstring: (MainActivity mainActivity, List< Book > bookList, DataBaseConnection db, User loggedInUser, UIMaster uiMaster)
memberdef.name: CostumeListAdapter

detaileddescription.para: Creates and configures a ViewHolder for displaying a book item in the RecyclerView.
Binds book data from the list to the provided view holder at the specified position.
Returns the number of books in the list.
Updates the book list with new data and notifies the adapter of changes.

inbodydescription.para: Returns the size of the book list.
Returns the size of the newBooks list.
Checks if items at given positions have the same ID.
Checks if the contents of two books at specified positions are the same.

detaileddescription.para: Shuts down the database executor if it is not null.
Binds data from a Book object to a BookViewHolder.

This method updates the UI components of a book item in the RecyclerView, including loading the book's image, setting its details, handling notes, and managing click events for removal and navigation. It also ensures that any existing text watchers are removed before adding new ones to prevent duplicate callbacks. Additionally, it manages asynchronous database operations for retrieving and updating notes.

parameterdescription.para: The BookViewHolder instance holding the book's UI components.
The Book object containing the data to bind.
The position of the book in the RecyclerView.

detaileddescription.para: Creates a DebouncedTextWatcher that updates notes in the database when text changes.
